question: Are all the strawberries on the fruit tarts, including those on the bottom shelf, replaced with cherries?
Is the image completely free of any remaining strawberries?
Do the replacement fruits have the characteristic round shape and smooth skin of cherries, distinct from the original strawberries?
Are the cherries rendered in a realistic vibrant red color consistent with the display lighting?
Do the cherries display realistic glossy highlights and reflections consistent with the environment?
Are the cherries appropriately scaled relative to the pastries and positioned naturally on the cream/custard?
Are other fruits, such as raspberries and yellow apricots/peaches, preserved without being altered?
Are the other pastries (macarons, cream puffs, éclairs, mille-feuille) completely unchanged?
Is the pastry crust and base structure of the modified tarts preserved in texture and color?
Is the edited area sharp and free from blurring or resolution loss compared to the rest of the image?
Is the image free from visual artifacts, such as halos, unnatural seams, or color bleeding around the cherries?
